text:
Team GB divers are turning to OnlyFans to ‘help fund their Olympic dreams’.

Jack Laugher MBE, 29, and Noah Williams, 23, have posted on the online platform the same week they were selected for theParisOlympics.

Noah wrote in his profile description: ‘SFW Content Support myOlympicsjourney :) 2 posts a week chat to me personally.’

Jack described himself as a ’28-year-old British driver and Olympic Champion’.

They could be earning thousands a month, but questions have been raised over how much they are earning as athletes.

Start your day informed with Metro'sNews Updatesnewsletter or getBreaking Newsalerts the moment it happens.

Other drivers including Daniel Goodfellow and Matthew Dixon are also on the website.

He became the first Olympic Great British champion in diving in 2016.

Noah is Tom Daley’s diving partner with the pair finishing second to Chinese duo Yang Hao and Lian Junjie in Doha earlier this year.

One source toldthe Sun: ‘These guys train so hard and there is little time for them to earn outside the pool.

‘They’re all in incredible shape and if they can top up their Team GB money in this way then good luck to them.

‘In an ideal world they’d get paid more and not need to but bosses are very relaxed about the OnlyFans work.’

An OnlyFans spokesperson said: ‘A significant number of professional and amateur athletes across a wide range of sports have joined OnlyFans to help them to pursue their sporting goals by monetising their content, offering their fans access to exclusive content and behind-the-scenes insights.

‘We are proud to support all of the athletes who join our platform.’
